title: D3D12 Copy Queue and Compute Queue Overlap

question.ja: Direct3D 12 で COPY queue と COMPUTE queue を分けたとき、UPLOAD/READBACK 経由の copy と low-memory compute は x+y ではなく max(x, y) に近い wall time で重なるか。目的は D3D12 で CUDA 以外の GPGPU API として通信-計算のオーバーラップが技術的にできるかを確認すること。
question.en: When COPY and COMPUTE queues are separated in Direct3D 12, do UPLOAD/READBACK-based copies and low-memory compute overlap with wall time closer to max(x, y) than x+y? The goal is to confirm whether a non-CUDA GPGPU API can technically achieve communication-compute overlap.

focus: Technical overlap in a non-CUDA GPGPU API
COPY queue + COMPUTE queue wall-time behavior
H2D-like upload copy and D2H-like readback copy in one bench
Wall time vs x+y and vs max(x, y)

comparisons.ja: UPLOAD->DEFAULT copy + compute と DEFAULT->READBACK copy + compute の違い
comparisons.en: Difference between UPLOAD->DEFAULT copy + compute and DEFAULT->READBACK copy + compute

comparisons.ja: 同時実行 wall time が x+y に近いか max(x, y) に近いか
comparisons.en: Whether simultaneous wall time stays closer to x+y or max(x, y)

comparisons.ja: OpenCL bench で確認した pinned-like overlap と D3D12 queue overlap の比較材料
comparisons.en: Comparison point between OpenCL pinned-like overlap and D3D12 queue-based overlap

considerations.ja: この bench は CUDA の pinned/pageable 比較を D3D12 上で再現するものではない。D3D12 で COPY queue と COMPUTE queue を分けることで、技術的な overlap が成立するかだけを見る。
considerations.en: This benchmark does not try to recreate CUDA pinned/pageable comparisons on D3D12. It only checks whether technical overlap appears when COPY and COMPUTE queues are separated.

considerations.ja: H2D-like は UPLOAD heap から DEFAULT resource への copy、D2H-like は DEFAULT resource から READBACK heap への copy と定義する。
considerations.en: H2D-like is defined as a copy from an UPLOAD heap to a DEFAULT resource, and D2H-like is defined as a copy from a DEFAULT resource to a READBACK heap.

considerations.ja: 主判定は wall time を使う。overlap 本番では queue 間の相互 wait を入れず、最後に CPU 側で両 queue の完了を待つ。
considerations.en: The main judgment uses wall time. During the overlap run, no inter-queue waits are inserted; the CPU only waits for both queues to finish at the end.

considerations.ja: kernel はループ中にほぼレジスタ演算だけを行い、最後に 1 回だけ UAV へ書く。copy と同じメモリ資源を奪わないようにして、queue overlap を見やすくする。
considerations.en: The kernel performs almost entirely register-side work in the loop and writes to a UAV only once at the end. This avoids competing for the same memory path as the copy and makes queue overlap easier to read.

considerations.ja: D3D12 の UPLOAD/READBACK heap は CUDA の raw PCIe memcpy と完全に同じ経路とは限らない。特に H2D-like の見かけ帯域は CUDA の PCIe 帯域 bench よりかなり高く出ることがあり、ここでは帯域値そのものより overlap ratio を主に読む。
considerations.en: D3D12 UPLOAD/READBACK heaps do not necessarily map to the exact same path as raw CUDA PCIe memcpy. In particular, H2D-like apparent bandwidth can exceed the CUDA PCIe benchmark by a large margin, so this benchmark should be read primarily through overlap ratios rather than raw bandwidth.

summary.ja: この RTX 5090 環境では、D3D12 でも COPY queue と COMPUTE queue を分けることで copy+compute overlap が明確に成立した。H2D-like も D2H-like も wall time は x+y ではなくほぼ max(x, y) 側に寄り、少なくとも D3D12 は CUDA 以外の GPGPU API として通信-計算 overlap を技術的に実現できている。
summary.en: On this RTX 5090 system, D3D12 clearly achieved copy+compute overlap by separating the COPY and COMPUTE queues. Both H2D-like and D2H-like wall times stayed much closer to max(x, y) than x+y, so D3D12 technically succeeds as a non-CUDA GPGPU API for communication-compute overlap.

highlights.ja: 128 MB H2D-like: ratio 0.526931, overlap wall 1.225420 ms
highlights.en: 128 MB H2D-like: ratio 0.526931, overlap wall 1.225420 ms

highlights.ja: 128 MB D2H-like: ratio 0.520940, overlap wall 2.563445 ms
highlights.en: 128 MB D2H-like: ratio 0.520940, overlap wall 2.563445 ms

highlights.ja: 512 MB D2H-like: ratio 0.513452, overlap wall 9.692970 ms
highlights.en: 512 MB D2H-like: ratio 0.513452, overlap wall 9.692970 ms

highlights.ja: H2D-like apparent bandwidth reached 102-128 GiB/s, so raw bandwidth here should not be read as a direct PCIe equivalent
highlights.en: H2D-like apparent bandwidth reached 102-128 GiB/s, so raw bandwidth here should not be read as a direct PCIe equivalent
